diagrams.title: Logical Processing Order of a SELECT Query

visuals.title: Select Queries
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">SELECT Queries and Aggregations</text>
  
  <!-- Database Table -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="160" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Database Table
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Column Headers -->
  <rect x="55" y="95" width="110" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Column Headers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Data Rows -->
  <rect x="55" y="120" width="110" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="55" y="145" width="110" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="55" y="170" width="110" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="55" y="195" width="110" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- SELECT Query -->
  <rect x="200" y="60" width="160" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    SELECT Query
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Table to Query -->
  <path d="M170 80 L200 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Aggregation Functions -->
  <rect x="200" y="130" width="160" height="90" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Aggregation Functions
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Function Examples -->
  <text x="280" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    COUNT(), SUM(), AVG()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="280" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    MAX(), MIN(), GROUP BY
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Query to Aggregation -->
  <path d="M280 100 L280 130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Results Output -->
  <rect x="200" y="240" width="160" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Results Output
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Aggregation to Results -->
  <path d="M280 220 L280 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
